info.name: NewAstro (External Horoscope API)
info.description:
The external horoscope provider consumed by the Horoscope API (`NewAstroSettings:BaseUrl`).

It exposes a single `POST /` endpoint that takes `{ date, lang, sign }` and returns the horoscope text for that sign.

Note: the API rejects requests sent with `Transfer-Encoding: chunked`. Postman sends a `Content-Length` header by default, so it works out of the box. In our `NewAstroClient` we serialize the body manually with `StringContent` for the same reason.

request.description:
Returns the horoscope for the given sign/date/lang.

- `date`: `yyyy-MM-dd`
- `lang`: language code (the API uses `es`)
- `sign`: English capitalized sign name (e.g. `Aries`, `Taurus`, `Gemini`, ... `Pisces`).
